settings.heading: REAL INTENT REAL DIRECTION
settings.body:
VIRE is built around clean silhouettes, controlled graphics, and pieces that feel deliberate from first wear.

The store experience is minimal, fast, and product-first so every customer can move from discovery to checkout without noise.
settings.card_1_text: Every drop is edited down to pieces that carry the brand direction.
settings.card_2_text: Washed tones, relaxed cuts, and wearable proportions.
settings.card_3_text: A quiet uniform for daily movement.
